surface: WorkshopLM local production UI in the ChatGPT/Codex in-app browser
observedSequence: Opened an already delivered Workshop with one Source, an approved Brief, a reused saved Style, and Presentation Version 1.
Added Thursday client meeting from the visible Add source sheet.
Observed two Map ideas, two selected Sources, and Approve brief replacing View brief.
Approved Brief Version 2 and observed both meeting excerpts while Client system remained current at Style Version 1.
Observed Presentation Version 1 as Needs update before regeneration.
Selected Update outputs and observed Presentation Version 2 as Up to date with two Sources while Version 1 remained visible as Needs update.
Observed Version 2 cite claims from both Monday and Thursday, including pilot approval and the Monday start recommendation.
Reloaded the production surface and confirmed historical staleness no longer caused the current Output set to show a false Update outputs action.
repairs: Source ingestion now invalidates approved Brief, Sketch, asset plan, image batch, Storyboard, narration, Outputs, and Video dependencies while preserving the reusable Style.
Current Output status is calculated from the latest version of each type instead of every historical record.
Partial success remains distinct from stale work.
Generic professional labels Presentation and Infographic replace demo-specific Build Week presentation and Evidence infographic labels.
Visual tests follow saved-first Style progressive disclosure and current source-count and action language.
limitations: This run used deterministic local source material and did not make paid OpenAI provider calls.
The external AI Collective deck still requires a cold professional Send or Revise judgment.
Realtime microphone, GPT-5.6, GPT Image 2, and provider narration remain separately spend-gated.
